chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 123 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. ***************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2023 and lastly fixed before the Court on 07.05.2025 when counsel for petitioner was directed to place on record any provision under the Government of Sindh is bound to pay the financial assistance to private schools thereafter no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
